name: Out of Credits Apps
subtitle: Sports streams. No ads. Your way.
description: Home of StreamCenter — a free, open sports streaming app that lets you watch live games from any source you choose. Add your own stream sites, favorite your teams and leagues, and enjoy completely ad-free playback. No subscriptions, no popups, no nonsense.

apps.name: StreamCenter
apps.subtitle: Live sports streams, zero ads.
apps.localizedDescription:
StreamCenter is your all-in-one hub for live sports streaming.

Watch NFL, NBA, MLB, NHL, soccer, MMA, boxing, and more — pulled straight from the web, with no ads interrupting the action.

• Add any sports streaming site as a custom source
• Browse live and upcoming games across every league
• Favorite your teams and leagues for instant access
• Ad-free playback powered by a built-in content blocker
• Supports m3u8 and DASH streams with native AVPlayer quality
• No account required. No subscription. Completely free.

versions.localizedDescription: Internal stability fixes: resolved Swift 6 concurrency issues in the team database, scraper, and match-helpers, plus a Settings build fix. No user-facing changes.

TV guide: in-progress and overtime games now show full team names and logos in wider, non-overlapping blocks. Channel up/down now follows the on-screen channel listing and pages the guide to keep the tuned-in channel in view.

Major redesign: new TV-guide home screen. A built-in TV plays the best live game while a channel-style grid lays out live and upcoming games on a horizontally scrollable timeline (channels = leagues/sports, sized to each game's length). Tap any game to load it in place, channel-surf with the up/down controls, and go full screen natively. Finished games are now hidden, live games sort to the top, and the guide opens at the current time with a red now-line. Reorganized, TV-themed Settings with a new All Favorites page.

ppv.to WebView fallback: when AVPlayer stalls on session-gated CDN streams, the embedded ppv.to player activates automatically after 8 seconds. Fixes bintv pair-order stream matching so home/away team order no longer breaks game link resolution. Unwraps embedded stream links for correct direct playback.

HostFallback silently retries TLD variants when a source hostname fails DNS (content-block / carrier filter / Screen Time). Looser league matching catches /league/nflstreams, /nbaregular66, /mlbwildcard style slugs. Plus prior fixes: CachedAsyncImage, persistent TeamLogoStore, word-boundary team match, UFL→Other, ESPN-aware classification, generic API discovery. No default sources — add your own.

news.title: StreamCenter is here!
news.caption: Watch live sports from any source — completely ad-free.
